aeo_readiness.summary: The website has a basic level of AEO readiness with some positive elements like schema markup and clear service descriptions, but lacks depth in content, customer reviews, and structured data optimization.
quick_wins: Implement a strategy to collect and display customer reviews on the website and Google Business Profile.
Enhance content with location-specific keywords and detailed service information.
Optimize meta tags and headers with relevant keywords for better search visibility.

gbp_analysis.found: No Google Business Profile (GBP) found based on the provided information.
gbp_analysis.summary: The absence of a GBP significantly impacts local search visibility and customer trust. Creating and optimizing a GBP is crucial for local SEO.
critical_issues: No GBP exists for the business.
Lack of local search presence and customer engagement through GBP.

nap_citations.summary: The business has consistent NAP (Name, Address, Phone number) information on its website, but lacks citations across major directories and platforms.
action_items: Create and verify NAP citations on major directories like Yelp, Yellow Pages, and industry-specific platforms.
Ensure NAP consistency across all online platforms and social media profiles.
Monitor and update citations regularly to maintain accuracy.

schema_gaps: No Organization schema for the business.
Missing Service schema for individual services offered.
No Review schema to display customer testimonials.
No Local Business schema to enhance local SEO.

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of customer reviews and testimonials to build trust and authority.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Users searching for HVAC services in Miami, Florida due to low local search presence.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Implementing a review collection strategy and optimizing the website for local SEO.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Establishing the business as a trusted HVAC service provider through content marketing, customer reviews, and active GBP management.

page_title: American Thermal Services - Best Florida AC Service
